rationale: In the citing paper, Sandor and Wedel (2005) is cited in a grouped literature sentence as one example of prior efficient choice-design work that uses a single-objective D-criterion. The authors use this cluster to position their contribution (a dual-objective compound criterion), but they do not give this specific paper a distinct methodological or interpretive role in their development. There is no direct reuse or detailed engagement with this cited study beyond background framing.
